Deepseek vs. Each Other Model Analysis:

Comparing deepseek with Claude:

Metric: BLEU
  Deepseek - Mean: 0.04, Std: 0.02
  Claude - Mean: 0.04, Std: 0.03
  T-test: t = -0.82, p = 0.4169

Metric: METEOR
  Deepseek - Mean: 0.26, Std: 0.04
  Claude - Mean: 0.23, Std: 0.05
  T-test: t = 3.18, p = 0.0020

Metric: ROUGE_1
  Deepseek - Mean: 0.44, Std: 0.09
  Claude - Mean: 0.44, Std: 0.08
  T-test: t = -0.02, p = 0.9866

Metric: ROUGE_2
  Deepseek - Mean: 0.13, Std: 0.05
  Claude - Mean: 0.12, Std: 0.06
  T-test: t = 0.42, p = 0.6745

Metric: ROUGE_L
  Deepseek - Mean: 0.19, Std: 0.03
  Claude - Mean: 0.19, Std: 0.04
  T-test: t = 0.67, p = 0.5015

Metric: Flesch_Reading_Ease
  Deepseek - Mean: 50.06, Std: 6.01
  Claude - Mean: 51.23, Std: 5.58
  T-test: t = -0.99, p = 0.3244

Metric: Coverage_Claude
  Deepseek - Mean: 2.60, Std: 0.61
  Claude - Mean: 3.73, Std: 0.74
  T-test: t = -8.15, p = 0.0000

Metric: Faithfulness_GPT
  Deepseek - Mean: 2.21, Std: 0.58
  Claude - Mean: 3.29, Std: 0.94
  T-test: t = -6.77, p = 0.0000

Comparing deepseek with GPT:

Metric: BLEU
  Deepseek - Mean: 0.04, Std: 0.02
  GPT - Mean: 0.05, Std: 0.04
  T-test: t = -1.67, p = 0.0998

Metric: METEOR
  Deepseek - Mean: 0.26, Std: 0.04
  GPT - Mean: 0.25, Std: 0.06
  T-test: t = 1.50, p = 0.1375

Metric: ROUGE_1
  Deepseek - Mean: 0.44, Std: 0.09
  GPT - Mean: 0.46, Std: 0.09
  T-test: t = -0.97, p = 0.3345

Metric: ROUGE_2
  Deepseek - Mean: 0.13, Std: 0.05
  GPT - Mean: 0.13, Std: 0.06
  T-test: t = -0.35, p = 0.7304

Metric: ROUGE_L
  Deepseek - Mean: 0.19, Std: 0.03
  GPT - Mean: 0.19, Std: 0.04
  T-test: t = 0.12, p = 0.9081

Metric: Flesch_Reading_Ease
  Deepseek - Mean: 50.06, Std: 6.01
  GPT - Mean: 46.40, Std: 5.96
  T-test: t = 3.00, p = 0.0035

Metric: Coverage_Claude
  Deepseek - Mean: 2.60, Std: 0.61
  GPT - Mean: 3.69, Std: 0.85
  T-test: t = -7.15, p = 0.0000

Metric: Faithfulness_GPT
  Deepseek - Mean: 2.21, Std: 0.58
  GPT - Mean: 3.50, Std: 0.92
  T-test: t = -8.20, p = 0.0000
